title: PRForge Mesh Certification
description: Schema for .prforge/mesh/mesh_certification.json — final certification binding manager verdict to artifact hashes

coordinator_verdict.description: SHA256 of coordinator_verdict.json at time of certification

auditor_verdict.description: SHA256 of auditor_verdict.json at time of certification

diff.description: SHA256 of git diff --stat + git diff --cached --stat at time of certification

_signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of canonical JSON (excludes _signature field)
